pr.title: [WIP] Create enterprise-grade AI laboratory with Anthropic SDK
pr.body:
Thanks for asking me to work on this. I will get started on it and keep this PR's description up to date as I form a plan and make progress.


<!-- START COPILOT ORIGINAL PROMPT -->



<details>

<summary>Original prompt</summary>

> Create an enterprise-grade AI laboratory using .NET 10 and the official Anthropic SDK.
> 
> The repository must demonstrate modern backend engineering and real-world AI integration patterns.
> 
> Architecture requirements:
> 
> - Clean Architecture
> - Vertical Slice Architecture
> - SOLID principles
> - Dependency Injection
> - Options Pattern
> - Background Workers
> - AI orchestration layer
> - Structured logging
> - Resilience with Polly
> - OpenTelemetry integration
> - Docker support
> - Environment-based configuration
> 
> Projects:
> 
> - Api
> - Application
> - Domain
> - Infrastructure
> - Worker
> - Shared Contracts
> 
> Features:
> 
> - REST API for prompt execution
> - Claude integration using Anthropic SDK
> - Streaming responses
> - Prompt templates
> - Conversation context management
> - Retry policies
> - Health checks
> - Centralized exception handling
> - Request correlation
> - Rate limiting
> 
> Infrastructure:
> 
> - Docker Compose
> - Redis for cache/context
> - PostgreSQL
> - Kafka or RabbitMQ for async processing
> 
> Include:
> 
> - README.md
> - Architecture diagram
> - Sample requests
> - Example prompts
> - Environment variable documentation
> 
> Code quality requirements:
> 
> - Use modern C#/.NET 10 patterns
> - Use async/await correctly
> - Avoid static helper classes when possible
> - Use interfaces and abstractions properly
> - Follow production-grade naming conventions
> 
> The repository should look like a real enterprise AI backend platform suitable for Senior/Staff engineer 


</details>
pr.author: Copilot
